title: Lunge Enchantment Improvement
description: Overhauls the Lunge enchantment for the new spear weapon to be more versatile and fun while keeping it vanilla friendly
body:
This mod overhauls the new spear weapons' enchantment Lunge in a fun and versatile, but vanilla friendly way!
- Lunging does not consume hunger if the player moves 1 block or less (is being blocked)
- Lunge gives a boost while flying with Elytra, however instead of consuming hunger, the spear takes extra damage while airborn.
- Lunge now works when standing in water if not fully submerged to not replace riptide functionality. This also consumes normal amount of hunger.

Join the dc server for updates and suggestions!
